meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Students: Scale Your AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with unscalable code. Learn to manage AI projects effectively using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade software.
content.answer_block: To overcome scaling hurdles, transition from monolithic scripts to modular, agentic architectures. Use Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code to automate repetitive boilerplate. By enforcing strict project management boundaries—decoupling logic from data—you turn fragmented student prototypes into production-ready, scalable AI applications that demonstrate true engineering maturity.
content.intro:
You’ve built the MVP. It works on your machine, but the moment you try to add a second feature, the codebase becomes a tangled web of technical debt. You’re trapped in the 'student loop'—constantly refactoring, losing focus, and watching your project collapse under its own weight. Scaling isn't about working harder; it's about shifting from a coder mentality to an architect's mindset.

This guide breaks the cycle. By leveraging Antigravity for structural integrity and Claude Code for rapid, context-aware execution, you will transform your chaotic workflow into a high-velocity development engine. It is time to stop hacking and start building systems that can handle real-world complexity.

steps.title: Decompose the Monolith
steps.description: Break your large script into modular components based on domain-driven design principles to ensure future scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and propose a modular file architecture that separates business logic, API integrations, and data handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor the codebase into the proposed modular structure without breaking current functionality'

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Establish a centralized state to avoid prop-drilling or global variable chaos as your application expands.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a lightweight state management pattern for this AI application that tracks user session context and tool execution status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply the state management pattern to all files currently accessing global data'

steps.title: Automate Documentation with Docstrings
steps.description: Ensure your code is self-documenting to allow for easier team collaboration and faster onboarding later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review all functions and generate comprehensive, standardized docstrings following Google Python Style Guide.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add docstrings to all undocumented functions in the src directory'

steps.title: Integrate Automated Testing
steps.description: Create a suite of unit tests to ensure that new features do not break existing functionality as you scale.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a pytest suite for the core modules identified in step one, ensuring 80% coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create unit tests for all modules and execute them to verify current baseline'

steps.title: Continuous Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Set up a routine to have the AI identify and remove technical debt after every major feature release.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for code smells and suggest a refactoring roadmap for the next two weeks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'execute the top three refactoring tasks from the roadmap provided by Antigravity'

pro_tips: Treat your CLI history as a project log; review it weekly to identify recurring bottlenecks.
Always define your 'Done' criteria in a README.md before letting Claude Code touch your files.
Use Antigravity to simulate edge cases before writing the actual implementation code.
Keep your context window clean by deleting temporary test files after verification.
Prioritize 'Interface First' development; define the API contract before building the implementation.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, deploy your project to a cloud provider like Vercel or Railway and begin tracking your performance metrics using observability tools like LangSmith.
content.conversion_block: You now have the architecture to build beyond the prototype phase. Stop letting technical debt define your limits and start engineering solutions that last. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
